titles.text: Gakkou de Atta Kowai Hanashi S
学校であった怖い話 S

roms.name: Gakkou de Atta Kowai Hanashi S (Japan)

descriptions.text:
Gakkou Deatta Kowai Hanashi S is a survival horror visual novel, developed by Pandora Box and published by Banpresto, which was released in Japan in 1996 and is the PlayStation version of that SNES game featuring enhanced graphics and sounds and new FMV sequences.

The game features pictures of real Japanese actors/models, and CAMERA J. The game is a compilation of about 50 scary stories which is played in the setting of a school. The graphics bring up a feeling of fear by using on-the-spot photography. Since it uses multi-stories, you can enjoy those stories any number of times.

The main character hears one scary tales at a time from six storytellers, experiencing each one firsthand. A multi-scenario, multi-ending system is employed so that a scary ending no one could possibly predict results, depending on the main character's decisions! The game's story changes according to the order you listen to the storytellers, the choices you make, and the gender of the main character. There is even a hidden scenario that only appears when special conditions are satisfied.
Infinite horror awaits.

Now, let the tales of horror begin.
